RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT G4S GOVERNMENT SOLUTIONS, INC.'s Motion To Abate The Complaint Or, Alternatively, To Stay Proceedings Or Transfer To Los Angeles Superior Court-Complex Division is denied. The parties should have the case designated complex and seek coordination pursuant to CCP 403 and 404. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest J. MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF GARRETT JENKINS' Motion For Reconsideration Of Denial Of Complex Designation And Objection To Assigning Case Management To A Temporary Judge Pursuant To Local Rule 3.3 is transferred to Dept. 304.
